name: Safe T School Transit
recent_news: No public news found; very small Vermont operator with limited online footprint. Phone (802) 674-5757 appears on Yellow Pages school-bus listings in the White River Junction/Hartford VT area.
fit_notes: Too small for a meaningful tuck-in (revenue ~$193K, ~5 employees); no confirmed district contracts found. Likely sub-scale owner-op; only relevant if Summit is doing micro-roll-ups in northern New England.

name: Midtown Express Trnsprtn Svc
districts_or_customers: Denver, Arapahoe, Douglas, Jefferson, and Adams counties
recent_news: Operating since July 2000 in Aurora CO as a non-emergent medical transportation provider; multilingual drivers (English, Russian, Spanish, Hebrew, Chinese, Japanese). No M&A activity found.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator — pure NEMT / wheelchair van service for Medicaid. Outside Summit's school-transportation thesis. Skip.

name: All One Transports
recent_news: No public news or website found; founded ~2023 as a small Cleveland OH operator. Appears to be a single-vehicle NEMT/special-needs transport, not a school-bus district contractor.
fit_notes: Too small and too new (2023 founding, ~$223K revenue, 3 employees) for a tuck-in. Likely solo NEMT operator; no district contracts. Skip.

name: Waymakers Mobility Transport
recent_news: Brand-new Texas LLC incorporated January 26, 2026 in Cedar Park TX. No website, no phone, no operating history.
fit_notes: Brand-new (2026) micro-entity with no track record, no fleet visibility, and no district contracts. Not a viable tuck-in target. Skip.

name: Matos Transportation-Mobility
recent_news: Very small new entrant (founded ~2025) operating from a residential address in New City, Rockland County NY. No website, no phone, no public footprint.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-vehicle mobility operator with no district contracts and no operating history; not a school-bus contractor. Skip.
